name: ElectroMachines Lab API
description: Machine-readable data feed of all available electrical machine simulators and educational content

about.name: Electrical Machines
about.description: Interactive simulations for learning DC motors, AC motors, transformers, PMSM, induction machines, power electronics, and renewable energy systems

dataset.name: DC Motor Simulator
dataset.description: Interactive DC motor simulator for learning shunt, series, and compound motor characteristics. Adjust voltage, current, field resistance, and see real-time speed-torque curves.

dataset.name: Synchronous Machine Simulator
dataset.description: Explore synchronous motor and generator operation with field excitation control, phasor diagrams, and power factor adjustment.

dataset.name: Induction Machine Simulator
dataset.description: Deep dive into asynchronous motors and generators with slip analysis. Visualize magnetic field rotation and stator-rotor interaction.

dataset.name: PMSM Simulator
dataset.description: Learn permanent magnet synchronous motor control techniques with vector control. Understand d-q axis transformation, torque control, and field-oriented control.

dataset.name: Transformer Simulator
dataset.description: Understand transformer operation, equivalent circuits, and applications. Interactive simulations for step-up, step-down, and isolation transformers.

dataset.name: Power Electronics Simulator
dataset.description: Learn DC-DC converters and inverters with our interactive power electronics simulator. Explore buck, boost, buck-boost topologies and PWM control.

dataset.name: Wind Turbine Simulator
dataset.description: Explore wind turbine power generation with our simulator. Understand Betz limit, blade pitch control, and power curve analysis.

dataset.name: Solar Panel Simulator
dataset.description: Learn about PV system power generation, I-V curves, MPPT algorithms, and how temperature and irradiance affect solar panel output.

dataset.name: V2G Technology Simulator
dataset.description: Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) simulator demonstrates how electric vehicles can provide grid services, frequency regulation, and bidirectional power flow.

dataset.name: eVTOL Simulations
dataset.description: Explore electric vertical takeoff and landing aircraft simulations including propulsion systems, battery management, and flight control.

dataset.name: BLDC Fan Simulator
dataset.description: Brushless DC fan simulator for understanding electronic commutation, motor control, and cooling system design.

dataset.name: Circuit Breaker Simulator
dataset.description: Learn about circuit breaker operation, fault detection, protection coordination, and interrupting ratings.

dataset.name: Compressor Simulator
dataset.description: Interactive compressor simulations for understanding compression cycles, motor drives, and HVAC systems.

dataset.name: Elevator/Lift Simulator
dataset.description: Interactive elevator simulations including motor control, braking systems, and traffic analysis.

dataset.name: Wide Bandgap Semiconductors
dataset.description: Learn about SiC and GaN semiconductors, their advantages, and applications in power electronics.

dataset.name: LED Lighting Simulator
dataset.description: Interactive LED lighting simulations including driver circuits, dimming, and color mixing.

dataset.name: Communication Systems
dataset.description: Learn about communication systems, modulation techniques, and signal processing in power electronics.

dataset.name: Construction Equipment
dataset.description: Simulations for electric construction equipment including motors, hydraulic systems, and control systems.

dataset.name: Quantum Computer Simulator
dataset.description: Interactive quantum computer simulator with qubit manipulation, quantum gates (Hadamard, Pauli-X/Y/Z, CNOT, T, S), Bloch sphere visualization, circuit builder, and measurement. Learn superposition, entanglement, and quantum algorithms.

faq.question: What is the best free online electrical machine simulator?
faq.answer: ElectroMachines Lab offers free interactive simulations for DC motors, AC motors, transformers, PMSM, induction machines, synchronous generators, and more. Perfect for electrical engineering students.

faq.question: How do I learn electrical machines online?
faq.answer: Use our interactive simulators to learn DC motors, AC motors, transformers, and power electronics. Each simulator includes real-time parameter control and visual waveforms.

faq.question: What is a DC motor simulator?
faq.answer: Our DC motor simulator allows you to explore shunt, series, and compound motor characteristics. Adjust voltage, current, field resistance, and see real-time speed-torque curves.

faq.question: How does an induction motor work?
faq.answer: Use our induction machine simulator to understand slip, torque-speed characteristics, and rotor behavior. Visualize magnetic field rotation and stator-rotor interaction.

faq.question: What is synchronous machine simulation?
faq.answer: Our synchronous machine simulator demonstrates generator and motor operation with field excitation control, phasor diagrams, and power factor adjustment.

faq.question: How do power electronics converters work?
faq.answer: Learn DC-DC converters and inverters with our interactive power electronics simulator. Explore buck, boost, buck-boost topologies and PWM control.

faq.question: What is PMSM control?
faq.answer: Permanent Magnet Synchronous Machine (PMSM) simulator with vector control. Understand d-q axis transformation, torque control, and field-oriented control.

faq.question: How do wind turbines generate electricity?
faq.answer: Explore wind turbine power generation with our simulator. Understand Betz limit, blade pitch control, and power curve analysis.

faq.question: What is solar panel simulation?
faq.answer: Learn about PV system power generation, I-V curves, MPPT algorithms, and how temperature and irradiance affect solar panel output.

faq.question: What is V2G technology?
faq.answer: Vehicle-to-Grid (V2G) simulator demonstrates how electric vehicles can provide grid services, frequency regulation, and bidirectional power flow.

faq.question: What is a quantum computer simulator?
faq.answer: Our quantum computer simulator lets you manipulate qubits using quantum gates like Hadamard, Pauli-X/Y/Z, CNOT, T, and S gates. Visualize quantum states on the Bloch sphere, build quantum circuits, and perform measurements to observe superposition and entanglement.

faq.question: How do quantum gates work?
faq.answer: Quantum gates are the fundamental operations in quantum computing. The Hadamard gate creates superposition, Pauli gates rotate qubit states on the Bloch sphere, and the CNOT gate creates entanglement between qubits. These gates form the building blocks of quantum algorithms.
